results.title: Malaysia’s FATF upgrade puts AML effectiveness on trial
results.description: Malaysia’s anti-money laundering and counter-terrorism financing (AML/CTF) regime hit a defining moment in early 2026, when the Financial Action Task Force (FATF) upgraded the country to “Regular Monitoring”, according to a report from RegTech firm Napier AI. The upgrade, Napier AI explains, reflects years of coordinated work between Bank Negara Malaysia (BNM), financial institutions and [...] The post Malaysia’s FATF upgrade puts AML effectiveness on trial appeared first on FinTech Global .

results.title: Why stress testing scenarios fail audits, and Kidbrooke’s fix
results.description: Risk teams building stress testing frameworks often hit the same wall, according to Kidbrooke. They hold a credible macroeconomic baseline, whether from a national forecast, board-approved assumptions or an in-house economics team, but lack a defensible method for converting it into the downside, central and upside scenarios their processes require. Spreadsheets can nudge a policy [...] The post Why stress testing scenarios fail audits, and Kidbrooke’s fix appeared first on FinTech Global .

results.title: The nuclear safety council gives the go-ahead for the Almaraz power station to remain in operation until 2030
results.description: The CSN has given its technical approval, and it will now be up to the central government to decide whether the plant in Extremadura remains open

results.title: Some Retirees Get $62,172 a Year in Social Security. Here’s How
results.description: A small group of retirees collects a Social Security check that dwarfs what most Americans ever see, and the rules behind qualifying are far stricter than people expect.

results.title: Modern markets offer hope for Kisumu traders despite project delays
results.description: Traders across Kisumu County have expressed optimism over the construction of 14 modern markets under the national government’s Economic Stimulus Programme (ESP), saying the facilities could improve hygiene, reduce post-harvest losses and boost incomes. However, they are also demanding faster implementation and greater transparency after contracts for some projects were terminated without public explanation. The [...]
